sections.title: How You Move
sections.question: How do you get around?
sections.description: Transportation is responsible for almost 25% of global emissions.

options.label: Car
options.recommendationText: Try carpooling or using public transport 2-3 days a week.

options.label: Bike / Scooter
options.recommendationText: Keep your vehicle well-maintained for better fuel efficiency.

options.label: Train
options.recommendationText: Great choice! Trains are highly efficient for long distances.

options.label: Metro
options.recommendationText: Metro is one of the greenest ways to commute in the city.

options.label: Bus
options.recommendationText: Buses reduce traffic and per-passenger emissions significantly.

options.label: Flight
options.recommendationText: Reduce short-distance flights where possible and opt for trains.

sections.title: How You Live
sections.question: How do you use energy at home?
sections.description: Home energy use is a major contributor to personal carbon footprints.

options.label: Air Conditioner
options.recommendationText: Increase thermostat temperature by 1-2°C to save significant energy.

options.label: Ceiling Fan
options.recommendationText: Fans use a fraction of the energy of an AC. Good job!

options.label: LED Lighting
options.recommendationText: LEDs are extremely energy efficient.

options.label: Geyser
options.recommendationText: Turn off the geyser immediately after use or switch to solar heating.

options.label: Solar Panels
options.recommendationText: Solar panels significantly offset your grid energy reliance!

options.label: Energy Efficient Appliances
options.recommendationText: 5-star rated appliances save money and emissions over time.

sections.title: How You Eat
sections.question: How do you usually eat?
sections.description: Food production accounts for over a quarter of global greenhouse gas emissions.

options.label: Meat Frequently
options.recommendationText: Try one plant-based meal weekly to lower your food footprint.

options.label: Eggs / Poultry
options.recommendationText: Poultry has a lower footprint than red meat, but consider more plant proteins.

options.label: Vegetarian
options.recommendationText: Vegetarian diets are very carbon efficient.

options.label: Vegan
options.recommendationText: Vegan diets have the lowest carbon footprint of all diet types.

options.label: Home Cooked Meals
options.recommendationText: Cooking at home reduces packaging and transport emissions.

options.label: Food Delivery Often
options.recommendationText: Try cooking at home more often to avoid single-use plastics and delivery logistics.

sections.title: How You Shop
sections.question: How do you usually shop?
sections.description: Manufacturing and shipping goods create massive industrial emissions.

options.label: Online Shopping Frequently
options.recommendationText: Consolidate your online orders to reduce delivery trips.

options.label: Fast Fashion
options.recommendationText: Invest in higher quality clothes that last longer instead of fast fashion.

options.label: Electronics Often
options.recommendationText: Repair devices before replacing them to reduce e-waste.

options.label: Reusable Products
options.recommendationText: Using reusable bags and bottles prevents plastic pollution.

options.label: Second Hand Purchases
options.recommendationText: Buying used goods extends their lifecycle and prevents new manufacturing emissions.

options.label: Minimalist Lifestyle
options.recommendationText: Buying only what you need is the most powerful way to reduce your footprint.

sections.title: Your Lifestyle
sections.question: Which best describes your lifestyle?
sections.description: Everyday habits add up to shape your overall impact.

options.label: Frequent Streaming
options.recommendationText: Stream on smaller screens or download via Wi-Fi to save data center energy.

options.label: Large Cloud Storage Usage
options.recommendationText: Delete old files and emails to reduce server power consumption.

options.label: New Phone Every Year
options.recommendationText: Keep your phone for at least 3-4 years to offset its manufacturing footprint.

options.label: Work From Home
options.recommendationText: Working from home eliminates your commute emissions.

options.label: Public Transport User
options.recommendationText: Using public transport regularly is one of the best habits for the planet.

options.label: Eco Conscious Habits
options.recommendationText: Keep spreading awareness! Your eco-friendly lifestyle makes a difference.
